verdict.summary: Guide is useful but materially misleading on eligibility and overstates/over-specifies several benefits that are not blanket Viver Cascais card benefits or need current tariff/regulation caveats.

issues.current: для жителей муниципалитета Кашкаиш (Cascais, Estoril, Alcabideche, São Domingos, Parede)
issues.problem: The list of civil parishes is inaccurate/outdated and incomplete: Cascais and Estoril are not separate freguesias, Carcavelos is missing, and 'São Domingos' should be 'São Domingos de Rana'.
issues.suggestion: Write: "для жителей муниципалитета Кашкаиш: Alcabideche; Carcavelos e Parede; Cascais e Estoril; São Domingos de Rana".
issues.source: Câmara Municipal de Cascais / administrative parish structure

issues.current: Работающие в муниципалитете, но живущие в другом — НЕ подходят (только residência)
issues.problem: This is misleading/wrong for Viver Cascais/MobiCascais purposes. Cascais has card/profile categories not only for residents; workers and students connected to Cascais can also be eligible for Viver Cascais access and free municipal public transport, subject to proof.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Есть разные профили Viver Cascais: residente, trabalhador, estudante и др. Для резидента нужен адрес в Cascais; работающие или учащиеся в Cascais, но живущие в другом município, могут оформить соответствующий профиль с declaração da entidade patronal/estabelecimento de ensino. Льготы могут отличаться по профилю."
issues.source: Viver Cascais official portal; MobiCascais/Cascais Próxima terms

issues.current: Любой житель муниципалитета Кашкаиш с atestado de residência (прописка ≥ 30 дней)
issues.problem: The '≥ 30 дней' requirement is presented as a hard eligibility rule but is not clearly the Viver Cascais rule. Usually the relevant point is having a valid proof of address/residence in Cascais, often an atestado/comprovativo issued recently; requirements can vary by Junta and by card profile.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Для профиля residente нужен comprovativo de morada/residência в município de Cascais — например atestado da Junta или иной документ, принимаемый порталом. Проверяйте срок действия документа; часто требуют документ, выданный недавно."
issues.source: Viver Cascais official portal

issues.current: Возраст неважен — дети с 6 лет могут иметь свою карту
issues.problem: The wording is internally confusing: if children only from 6 can have their own card, age does matter. Also the age threshold and procedure should be sourced because child access/transport rules can differ from adult card issuance rules.
issues.suggestion: Write more cautiously: "Карту/профиль можно оформить и для несовершеннолетних; для детей заявление подаёт законный представитель. Возрастные пороги и документы проверяйте на Viver Cascais."
issues.source: Viver Cascais official portal

issues.current: Иностранцы с ВНЖ — полностью ok
issues.problem: Too narrow and potentially misleading: EU citizens may have CRUE rather than a residence permit; some foreign residents may use passport plus accepted proof of address depending on profile. The decisive point is legal ID plus accepted proof/profile documents, not necessarily 'ВНЖ' in the Russian sense.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Иностранцы тоже могут оформить карту при наличии принятого удостоверения личности и документов, подтверждающих профиль: morada em Cascais / trabalho / estudo. Для граждан ЕС это может быть CC/паспорт + CRUE/адресные документы, для non-EU — título de residência или иной принимаемый документ."
issues.source: Viver Cascais official portal

issues.current: Бесплатные автобусы MobiCascais (кроме M-Line в Эшторил)
issues.problem: Over-broad and under-caveated. Free travel is not simply 'all MobiCascais buses' for anyone with any card; it depends on Viver Cascais profile/validation and the current Cascais Próxima/MobiCascais network rules. Exceptions and line names change, so naming only 'M-Line in Estoril' may be outdated or incomplete.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Муниципальные автобусы MobiCascais обычно бесплатны для валидированного профиля Viver Cascais residente/trabalhador/estudante, но нужно проверять текущие исключения по линиям и условия в приложении/на сайте MobiCascais."
issues.source: MobiCascais official website; Cascais Próxima tariff/rules

issues.current: Бесплатные велосипеды Bikes MobiCascais (до 45 мин в день)
issues.problem: Likely inaccurate/over-simplified. Bike-sharing conditions are tariff-plan based and usually limits are per trip/session, not simply '45 min per day'. Availability, deposits, overage fees, and resident/visitor tariffs need the current MobiCascais tariff table.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Bikes MobiCascais: для держателей Viver Cascais могут быть льготные/бесплатные условия по текущему тарифу; лимиты времени, штрафы за превышение и необходимость активировать услугу смотрите в приложении MobiCascais."
issues.source: MobiCascais official tariff/terms

issues.current: Dístico de residente — первый год бесплатно
issues.problem: This is stated as a general Viver Cascais benefit but resident parking permits are governed by Cascais Próxima municipal parking regulations/tariffs and depend on zone, vehicle/address eligibility and annual renewal. 'First year free' is not safely supported and may be wrong.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Dístico de residente оформляется отдельно через Cascais Próxima/Loja Cascais по адресу и автомобилю; стоимость, зоны, количество машин и сроки зависят от действующего regulamento/tabela de tarifas."
issues.source: Cascais Próxima parking regulations/tariff table

issues.current: Далее €10–30/год в зависимости от зоны
issues.problem: The annual parking-permit price range is unsourced and may be outdated or incomplete. Parking tariffs are sensitive and change by regulation; the guide should not give a precise range without the current Cascais Próxima tariff table.
issues.suggestion: Either remove the range or replace with: "тариф ежегодного dístico смотрите в действующей tabela de tarifas da Cascais Próxima; зависит от зоны/типа разрешения".
issues.source: Cascais Próxima parking tariff table

issues.current: Муниципальные бассейны: 30-50% скидка на абонементы
issues.problem: The percentage is too specific without naming the facility/tariff. Sports facilities in Cascais have different concessionaires, price lists and discounts; not all 'municipal pools' necessarily grant a uniform 30-50% Viver Cascais discount.
issues.suggestion: Write: "В некоторых муниципальных спортивных объектах есть тарифы/скидки для Viver Cascais; размер зависит от объекта и действующей таблицы цен."
issues.source: Câmara Municipal de Cascais / facility tariff tables

issues.current: Теннисные корты, футбольные поля: скидка 20-40%
issues.problem: Over-specific and unsourced. Facility tariffs and resident discounts vary; a blanket 20-40% promise may mislead users.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Некоторые спортивные объекты и партнёры дают тарифы для резидентов/Viver Cascais; проверяйте конкретный объект и расписание цен."
issues.source: Câmara Municipal de Cascais / facility tariff tables

issues.current: Библиотеки: бесплатный абонемент (читательская карта)
issues.problem: This is not a meaningful Viver Cascais-specific benefit if library registration is already free or broadly available. It may create the impression that Viver Cascais is required for library access.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Муниципальные библиотеки обычно имеют бесплатную регистрацию/читательскую карту; Viver Cascais может использоваться как ID/для отдельных программ, но не всегда обязателен."
issues.source: Bibliotecas Municipais de Cascais

issues.current: Театры Casa das Histórias Paula Rego, Centro Cultural — скидки 30-50%
issues.problem: Casa das Histórias Paula Rego is a museum, not a theatre. The 30-50% discount range is unsourced and likely varies by museum/exhibition/event/promoter; not a safe blanket Viver Cascais promise.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Музеи и культурные пространства Cascais могут давать бесплатный вход или скидки резидентам/Viver Cascais в зависимости от объекта и мероприятия; проверяйте страницу конкретного события."
issues.source: Câmara Municipal de Cascais / Fundação D. Luís I / Casa das Histórias Paula Rego

issues.current: Детские кружки и курсы в Casas da Juventude — бесплатно
issues.problem: Over-broad. Youth-centre activities may be free, paid, subsidised, limited by age/residence, or require registration. It is not safe to state all children's clubs/courses are free.
issues.suggestion: Write: "В Casas da Juventude есть бесплатные и платные активности; условия, возраст и цены зависят от программы и регистрации."
issues.source: Câmara Municipal de Cascais / Casas da Juventude programme pages

issues.current: Cascais Social Card — для пенсионеров и инвалидов, дополнительные льготы
issues.problem: This mixes Viver Cascais with separate social-support instruments and oversimplifies eligibility. Social cards/supports usually depend on age, disability, income, household and municipal rules, not merely pensioner/disabled status.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Социальные льготы оформляются отдельно от Viver Cascais и зависят от конкретной программы, дохода/возраста/инвалидности и оценки Câmara/Junta. Проверяйте раздел Ação Social Cascais."
issues.source: Câmara Municipal de Cascais — Ação Social

issues.current: Бесплатные медобследования (мамография, холестерин, сахар) раз в год
issues.problem: Potentially misleading as a blanket annual Viver Cascais benefit. Health screenings are generally programme-, age-, risk- and availability-dependent and may be run by SNS/municipal campaigns rather than by the card itself.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: "Муниципалитет периодически проводит программы профилактики/скрининга, но они зависят от возраста, критериев и расписания кампаний; это не гарантированная ежегодная услуга по карте."
issues.source: Câmara Municipal de Cascais health programmes; SNS screening programmes

issues.current: Документы: atestado, CC/ВНЖ, фото (можно с телефона), email
issues.problem: Document list is incomplete for non-resident profiles and too rigid for resident profiles. Workers/students need employer/school declarations; residents may be able to use accepted address proofs other than atestado depending on portal rules. The guide also omits NIF/phone or account validation if required by the portal.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Документы зависят от профиля: residente — documento de identificação + comprovativo de morada/residência; trabalhador — declaração da entidade patronal; estudante — declaração/comprovativo de matrícula; minors — guardian documents. Проверяйте список при регистрации."
issues.source: Viver Cascais official portal

issues.current: Карта приходит по почте 7-14 дней, либо заказываете приходом в Loja
issues.problem: Delivery timing and plastic-card issuance can vary and may not be guaranteed; digital validation may be immediate/after approval. The phrase 'заказываете приходом' is also unclear Russian.
issues.suggestion: Write: "После одобрения профиль/виртуальная карта становится доступен в приложении/портале; физическую карту, если нужна, можно запросить/получить по текущим правилам Loja Cascais. Сроки доставки не гарантированы."
issues.source: Viver Cascais official portal

issues.current: Cartão Família Cascais — для семей с 3+ детьми, дополнительные льготы в магазинах-партнёрах
issues.problem: Needs caveat that this is a separate programme/card from Viver Cascais and may have its own eligibility, renewal and partner list. '3+ children' should be tied to the official definition of família numerosa and household/residence rules.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Cartão Família Cascais — отдельная программа для famílias numerosas; обычно 3+ детей, но условия, документы, срок действия и партнёры проверяйте на странице программы."
issues.source: Câmara Municipal de Cascais — Cartão Família Cascais

issues.current: Atestado de residência от Junta: €5–15
issues.problem: The range may be plausible but is not universal: fees differ by Junta, urgency, format and exemptions. It should not be presented as fixed for all parishes.
issues.suggestion: Write: "примерно €5–15, но тариф зависит от Junta de Freguesia, срочности и способа выдачи; проверьте tabela de taxas своей Junta".
issues.source: Juntas de Freguesia tariff tables

issues.current: Only generic portal/homepage sources are listed: Viver Cascais, MobiCascais, Câmara Municipal de Cascais.
issues.problem: For precise claims about parking prices, bike limits, sports discounts, health screenings and social cards, generic homepages are not enough. The guide needs direct sources to current terms/tariff tables/programme pages.
issues.suggestion: Add direct sources for: Viver Cascais eligibility/FAQs; MobiCascais tariff and conditions; Cascais Próxima parking regulamento/tabela de tarifas; specific sports/culture facility tariff pages; Ação Social/Cartão Família Cascais pages.
issues.source: Viver Cascais; MobiCascais; Cascais Próxima; Câmara Municipal de Cascais

missing_topics: Distinction between Viver Cascais profiles: residente, trabalhador, estudante and visitor/other profiles, with different proofs and possibly different benefits.
Renewal/revalidation rules: whether the card/profile must be renewed or periodically validated and how expired proofs affect free transport.
Accepted proof alternatives: atestado da Junta vs tax address/comprovativo de morada vs employer/school declarations.
Direct link to current tariff/conditions pages for MobiCascais buses, Bikes, parking and resident permits.
Caveat that many sports, culture, health and social benefits are facility/programme-specific and not guaranteed merely by holding the card.
Procedure if the user moves out of Cascais or changes address/profile.
What to do if the physical card is lost and whether virtual card/app is sufficient for each service.
